nodes.label: IA Chat Screen — Schedule Chip Full Flow
nodes.description: Full IA (AI coach) chat screen for an active session. Header: 'Tu sesión activa' with back arrow, + icon, and calendar icon. Coach message at top: 'Estoy contigo en tu sesión activa.' with session status bullets: 15 min restantes, 3 apps fuera de tu mente, 1 ítem pendiente en tu ritual, 2 recordatorios activos. Coach offers: '¿En qué te ayudo ahora?' with action chip options: 'Organizar mi horario' (teal/primary), 'Añadir recordatorio', 'Sugerir ritual', 'Recomendar apps'. Below: second coach message showing scheduling result '¡Listo! Organicé tu sesión de hoy:' with bullet '17:34 — Respira y vuelve a ti' and notification confirmation. Bottom: message input field 'Pregúntame algo o describe cómo te sientes...' with attachment and send icons.
key_elements: scheduled time slot (17:34 — Respira y vuelve a ti)

nodes.label: Organizar mi horario — Primary Action Chip
nodes.description: Teal-filled primary action chip labeled 'Organizar mi horario' displayed in the IA chat as a suggested action. Triggers the coach to distribute ritual items across the remaining session time. Appears alongside secondary chips: Añadir recordatorio, Sugerir ritual, Recomendar apps.

nodes.label: Schedule Result Coach Message
nodes.description: Coach response after scheduling: '¡Listo! Organicé tu sesión de hoy:' with a scheduled slot '17:34 — Respira y vuelve a ti'. Confirms user will receive a notification before each moment and can adjust anytime. Ends with a heart emoji.

nodes.label: IA Chat Input Field
nodes.description: Bottom-anchored text input field with placeholder 'Pregúntame algo o describe cómo te sientes...' Includes attachment (paperclip) icon on left and send (arrow) icon on right.
